description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage. The job should set the variable TRAVIS_GH3 to '1' and execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip virtualenv pandoc; virtualenv --python=python3 var; var/bin/pip3 install --upgrade pip; var/bin/pip3 install -r requirements-test.txt; var/bin/py.test --cov=git_repo --cov-report term-missing tests. No additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules are required.
